dict.string: SAM Field uses your location to track business mileage for IRS documentation.
SAM Field uses background location to accurately track business mileage during trips.
SAM Field uses your contacts to show profile photos in the participant list when starting a recording.
SAM Field uses the camera only to scan the pairing QR code displayed on your Mac.
SAM Field streams meeting audio to your Mac running SAM for on-device transcription. All audio stays on your local network and is never sent to external servers.
